records.question: Which students named Pablo Wellings with email pwellingsh@hku.hk and phone number (996) 8465427 have taken the Data Structure and Algorithms course, where the difficulty is at least 4 and their SAT score is at most 3?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT student.student_id FROM student
JOIN registration ON student.student_id = registration.student_id
JOIN course ON registration.course_id = course.course_id
WHERE student.phone_number = '(996) 8465427' AND registration.sat <= 3 AND student.l_name = 'Wellings' AND course.name = 'Data Structure and Algorithms' AND course.diff >= 4 AND student.f_name = 'Pablo' AND student.email = 'pwellingsh@hku.hk'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id
FROM student s
JOIN registration r ON s.student_id = r.student_id
JOIN course c ON r.course_id = c.course_id
WHERE s.f_name = 'Pablo'
  AND s.l_name = 'Wellings'
  AND s.email = 'pwellingsh@hku.hk'
  AND s.phone_number = '(996) 8465427'
  AND c.name = 'Data Structure and Algorithms'
  AND c.diff >= 4
  AND r.sat <= 3
